AI Agents / IDE Extensions

Tool Layer

Request Translation

HTTP response → MCP result

Request ID correlation

div.style: color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Deployment Modes
───────────────────
Local: stdio, no auth, localhost backend
Cloud: HTTP+SSE, OAuth2 + cloud-native auth
───────────────────
AWS: Cognito + IAM SigV4
Azure: Entra ID + Managed Identity
